name: First Responder GIS and Data Export
description: The County Fire Marshal urgently needs updated mapping and chemical data for local facilities to integrate into their Computer-Aided Dispatch (CAD) system. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 application (which is already open), open the facility database located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\regional_facilities.t2s. First, locate the 'Metro Industrial' facility record, which is missing its spatial coordinates. Update its Latitude to '39.7684' and Longitude to '-86.1581' on the Facility Identification tab, and save the record. Second, export the entire facility database to KML format so it can be ingested by the GIS system; save this file as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\facilities.kml. Finally, export the chemical inventory data to CSV format for the flat-file database; save this file as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\chemicals.csv.
